channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: FTC opens Microsoft antitrust investigation that Trump administration must carry on or drop
item.description: Antitrust enforcers with the Federal Trade Commission have opened a wide-ranging investigation into Microsoft's business practices, starting a big legal project that an incoming Trump administration must take up or abandon.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Linux fundamentals: Viewing files, commands, processes and systems
item.description: Linux provides a useful array of commands for managing file permissions, getting information on commands, displaying running processes and displaying details on the system itself.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia's closest rival once again obliterates cloud giants in AI performance; Cerebras Inference is 75x faster than AWS, 32x faster than Google on Llama 3.1 405B
item.description: Cerebras Inference leads in AI performance; 75x faster than AWS, 32x faster than Google on Llama 3.1 405B.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: US Imposes New Export Controls on Semiconductor Chips and Equipment to China
item.description: The Biden administration's new restrictions on exports of semiconductor chips and equipment to China aim to impede China's ability to indigenize advanced technologies that pose a risk to national security.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger retires
item.description: Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger retired Sunday, after more than 40 years in the industry. The company quickly named two interim co-CEOs to hold the fort while it searches for a long-term replacement.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 7 surprisingly practical ways to use ChatGPT’s free voice wizard
item.description: This article is republished with permission from Wonder Tools, a newsletter that helps you discover the most useful sites and apps. Subscribe here. ChatGPT’s Advanced Voice Mode—free as of Oct 21—is like having a 24/7 wizard in your pocket.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Caplan, Fast Company

item.title: 9 ways scammers can use your phone number to try to trick you
item.description: Scammers can wreak havoc on your life just by having your phone number. Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson addresses how to avoid becoming a victim.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Helpful Hack: Siri's new tricks, photo magic and writing help with iOS 18.1's new AI features
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to update your iPhone to add Apple Intelligence, which he says can transform your interactions with your phone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Robots perform like human surgeons by just watching videos
item.description: University scientists have trained a robotic surgical system to do work with the skill of human doctors, possibly transforming the future of surgeries.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought banana art for $6.2 million eats the fruit in Hong Kong
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — A cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought a piece of conceptual art consisting of a simple banana, duct-taped to a wall, for $6.2 million last week ate the fruit in Hong Kong on Friday.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Canada sues Google claiming ‘near-total control’ of online ads
item.description: Canada’s antitrust watchdog said Thursday it was suing Google over its alleged anticompetitive conduct in online advertisements.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: Australian Parliament bans social media for under-16s with world-first law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — A social media ban for children under 16 passed the Australian Parliament on Friday in a world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Canada sues Google over alleged anticompetitive practices in online ads
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Canada's antitrust watchdog said Thursday it is suing Google over alleged anticompetitive conduct in the tech giant’s online advertising business and wants the company to sell off two of its ad tech services and pay a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Joshua trees are in peril. California has a plan to save them
item.description: The California Department of Fish and Wildlife has released a new plan to protect the state’s iconic Joshua trees, which are imperiled by wildfires, human development and climate change.
item.dc:creator: Dorany Pineda, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Uber branches out into AI data labeling
item.description: Uber no longer offers just rides and deliveries: It’s created a new division hiring out gig workers to help enterprises with some of their AI model development work.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: FTC opens antitrust investigation into Microsoft’s cloud, AI, and cybersecurity practices
item.description: The US Federal Trade Commission (FTC) has launched an antitrust investigation into Microsoft, scrutinizing its cloud computing, software licensing, cybersecurity, and AI businesses. The inquiry follows over a year of informal interviews with competitors and business partners, Bloomberg reported.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 10 steps to smarter Google account security
item.description: There are important accounts to secure, and then there are important accounts to secure. Your Google account falls into that second category, maybe even with a couple of asterisks and some neon orange highlighting added in for good measure.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Copilot Studio Agents get a major upgrade via Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: Microsoft Ignite 2024 put an end to Microsoft’s dalliance with chatbots. Not because the company is walking away from natural language interfaces, but because it’s taking what it learned with its first Copilots and refocusing on tangible productivity gains from large language models (LLMs).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Australia's social media ban for kids is closer to becoming law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia’s House of Representatives on Wednesday passed a bill that would ban children younger than 16 years old from social media, leaving it to the Senate to finalize the world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Talk in 2 languages with Apple Watch's real-time translation
item.description: Apple Watch's Translate app gives you your own personal interpreter, allowing you to have live two-way conversations in up to 20 different languages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
